name: Chocolate Chip Yogurt Cookies
recipeInstructions:
1. Beat the sugars, margarine, and shortening together until light and fluffy.
2. Add the nonfat yogurt and vanilla to the mixture. Stir in the flour, baking soda, salt, and chocolate chips.
3. Drop spoonfuls of the dough onto a sheet sprayed with Pam cooking spray.
4. Bake at 375°F (190°C) for 8-12 minutes.
5. Allow the cookies to cool for 1 minute on the sheet before transferring them to wire racks.
